# ARIA Design Patterns Index

Source: https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/

> **No ARIA is better than Bad ARIA.** Before using any ARIA, understand why: https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/practices/read-me-first/

## Widget Patterns

Each pattern describes how to build accessible components using ARIA roles, states, properties, and keyboard support.

| Pattern | Description | URL |
|---|---|---|
| Accordion | Vertically stacked interactive headings showing/hiding content sections | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/accordion/) |
| Alert | Brief important message displayed without interrupting user's task | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/alert/) |
| Alert Dialog | Modal dialog interrupting workflow for important message + response | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/alertdialog/) |
| Breadcrumb | List of links to parent pages in hierarchical order | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/breadcrumb/) |
| Button | Widget enabling user to trigger an action or event | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/button/) |
| Carousel | Set of slides displayed sequentially | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/carousel/) |
| Checkbox | Dual-state (checked/unchecked) or tri-state (+ partially checked) | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/checkbox/) |
| Combobox | Input widget with associated popup | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/combobox/) |
| Dialog (Modal) | Window overlaid on primary window or another dialog | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/dialog-modal/) |
| Disclosure | Widget toggling content between collapsed/expanded | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/disclosure/) |
| Feed | Section auto-loading new content as user scrolls | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/feed/) |
| Grid | Container with directional navigation (arrow keys, Home, End) | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/grid/) |
| Landmarks | Eight roles identifying major page sections | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/landmarks/) |
| Link | Interactive reference to a resource | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/link/) |
| Listbox | List of options allowing single or multiple selection | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/listbox/) |
| Menu / Menubar | List of choices (actions/functions) | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/menubar/) |
| Menu Button | Button that opens a menu | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/menu-button/) |
| Meter | Graphical display of numeric value within a range | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/meter/) |
| Radio Group | Set of checkable buttons, only one checked at a time | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/radio/) |
| Slider | Input selecting a value within a range | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/slider/) |
| Slider (Multi-Thumb) | Two or more thumbs on a single rail | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/slider-multithumb/) |
| Spinbutton | Input restricted to a set/range of discrete values | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/spinbutton/) |
| Switch | Input toggling between on/off | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/switch/) |
| Table | Static tabular structure (not interactive widget) | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/table/) |
| Tabs | Layered content sections, one visible at a time | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/tabs/) |
| Toolbar | Container grouping controls (buttons, menubuttons, checkboxes) | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/toolbar/) |
| Tooltip | Popup displaying info on focus/hover | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/tooltip/) |
| Tree View | Hierarchical list | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/treeview/) |
| Treegrid | Hierarchical data grid, editable or interactive | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/treegrid/) |
| Window Splitter | Moveable separator between two panes | [Link](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/windowsplitter/) |
